TimeEntry.Title: Re: 1.30 Phone Conversation
TimeEntry.Notes: I reviewed all email activity from January 14, 2026, through February 2, 2026, and identified several messages sent from jmadrid@corexalliance.com to your email address. No failed delivery attempts were found from the sender jmadrid@corexalliance.com.I also checked the mails from wms@corexpartners.com (found few mails delivered after 01/14 also).
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: New user setup
TimeEntry.Notes: New user setup getting details of user and laptop credentials

TimeEntry.Title: New User Setup
TimeEntry.Notes:
New user setup has been completed successfully for Andrew Case on computer ALG-HQ-LPT-16

  • Email account configured

  • Microsoft Teams and OneDrive set up

  • Foxit PDF and Google Drive installed

  • Local user profile created on the system

  • System updated with the latest Windows patches

  • Required technician tools installed on the system

The same has been updated to Sai.

TimeEntry.Title: New user setup
TimeEntry.Notes: New user setup and license activation

TimeEntry.Title: New user setup
TimeEntry.Notes: The laptop was setup for the new user all the tools and applications were installed. Only printer setup is left will be done if needed.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: 2FA for Godaddy
TimeEntry.Notes: Called GoDaddy and schedule the migration with them for the client. Verify all the access again along with the user list.

TimeEntry.Title: ALG-HQ-LPT-07,ALG-HQ-LPT-06 : Cisco umbrella updated with latest version
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed the machines and successfully updated both systems to the latest version of Cisco Secure Client (5.1.14.145). The updates were also recorded in the MyRMM database.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: RE: 2FA for Godaddy
TimeEntry.Notes:
Creation and management of GoDaddy migration ticket; preparation and confirmation of execution plan.

Initiation and active monitoring of email migration from GoDaddy to Microsoft 365 during scheduled window.

Validation of migration completion and initial system checks.

Password resets for all user accounts and communication of updated credentials to users.

End-user testing and validation:

  • Email send/receive testing for each user

  • Live confirmation via phone calls with client representative (Jyoti)

TimeEntry.Title: Bianca from ALG called in for email issue
TimeEntry.Notes:
Bianca from ALG called in for email issue...

So connect to her system and user is not able to login to her email.....

so make her login with the temporary password and also helped her in login to teams and outlook...

no more issue reported by the user.....hence closing the ticket.....

TimeEntry.Title: URGENT SUPPORT NEEDED
TimeEntry.Notes: As per request over call connected to her machine and verified that she is using the local account and reset her password and verified by login its working fine and updated the password in her outlook application as well.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: 2FA for Godaddy
TimeEntry.Notes: As shaundra called me and wants some help to buy the license from new vendor so setup the partner relationship and brought the license as per the request and verified these were showing on the their admin portal as well.

TimeEntry.Title: Password Restoration of Ms. Penny McNerney
TimeEntry.Notes: Password Restoration of Ms. Penny McNerney.

TimeEntry.Title: login issue on the ALG-HQ-LPT-16
TimeEntry.Notes:
As per Sai’s message, the user Andrew was unable to log in to the system because the password was not working. Multiple failed login attempts resulted in the user account being locked.

The account was unlocked from the backend using administrative commands. After successful login, it was observed that Outlook was not working, so the user was guided to reset the password.

After the password reset, all services were verified and are now working fine.

The issue has been resolved, and the ticket is now closed.

TimeEntry.Title: CAROLINA : Sign-in error in outlook
TimeEntry.Notes:
• Identified the authentication error on the user’s account.

  • Provided Carolina with a temporary password.

  • User successfully reset the password independently.

  • Confirmed that Carolina is now able to access Outlook and other applications without issues.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: outlook email setup for Robert
TimeEntry.Notes:
• Received a call from Robert (ALG) requesting assistance to set up Outlook.

  • Found that the user was unable to access his account due to a forgotten password.

  • Reset the password via the Office 365 admin portal.

  • Confirmed that the user is now able to access Outlook on his PC.

  • User expressed interest in setting up Outlook on his Apple phone and prefers to do it himself.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: DESKTOP-0JAP2P2 : Found myremote sync issue with this pc
TimeEntry.Notes:
• Machine Name/ID: DESKTOP-0JAP2P2

  • Issue Observed: The machine was showing as offline in MyRemote but was visible in MyRMM.

  • Diagnosis: Upon investigation, it was found that the machine had both the old and new versions of the software installed.

  • Action Taken: Removed the old version of the software.

  • Outcome: After removal, the machine started showing up continuously in MyRemote.

  • Current Status: Machine is now online and stable in MyRemote.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: OLIVEFLY : Thomas not able to sign-in teams/outlook
TimeEntry.Notes: Thomas was unable to sign in to Teams and Outlook due to a password reset required after migration. His password was reset and updated during sign-in, after which he successfully accessed all services.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: RSS Feeds
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed the machine and found that it was set to use the classic version of Outlook. I disabled the setting in the Advanced options.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: problem in outlook
TimeEntry.Notes:
Christina mailed in regarding the email issue.....

So connect to the system, user reported that emails are going to the RSS folder...

so checked the rules....there are multiple rules set-up...so checked with user all the rules and deleted the one which is not required...

After removing the rules....emails are going to the inbox...hence closing the ticket......

TimeEntry.Title: Email delivery Issue
TimeEntry.Notes:
Connected to the User Alicia system:

1. Made the foxit PDF default.

2. Reset the Outlook credential and helped the user to resolve the mobile outlook access issue.

3. Email delivery issue: Checked in the Office exchange, and provided the snap of the delivered emails to the user for the email address transportation@mclaneglobal.com

TimeEntry.Title: Leena From ALG called in regarding the Adobe issue...
TimeEntry.Notes:
Leena called in regarding the Adobe issue....

So connect to the user system...While opening any PDF file user is getting an error from Adobe....

so try to open the application but no go..

So repaired the Adobe Acrobat and restarted the computer...

Adobe is working fine now.....user is able to access the pdf files....hence closing the ticket.....

TimeEntry.Title: Email PermissionEmail Permission
TimeEntry.Notes:
User Sinem reported an issue that she is not receving emails from noreply@salesforce.com...

so login to the Office 365 admin portal and trace the emails and found that emails are getting quarntine...

so release the emails and also report it as false positive...

user confirmed that she has received the mail.....hence closing the ticket....

TimeEntry.Title: RSS Feeds
TimeEntry.Notes:
User shahrokh reported that he is still having the same issue emails are going to the RSS folder.....

so connect to his computer and checked the email rules...

their are multiple rules set-up...

so asked user to check the rules and delete the one which you are not familiar one...

so go through each rule one by one and make him delete and after that emails are coming to the inbox..

user want to observe the mail flow for a day....keeping the ticket in progress..

TimeEntry.Title: PreyaPatel,Carolina : Update cisco umbrella with latest version
TimeEntry.Notes: I accessed both the machines and download the latest version cisco-secure-client-win-5.1.14.145 and updated successfully.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: RE: 2FA for Godaddy
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the M365 admin portal and then worked with Shaundra to update the correct licenses. Found the GoDaddy did not cancelled the subscriptions yet and they have renewed the subscriptions again. Called to GoDaddy support and open case with them and have them initiate the refund of the charges.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: Deepak Bansal
TimeEntry.Notes: Received the email on support from Andrew Case regarding receiving a phishing email claiming to be from Deepak Bansal, asking to purchase gift cards. Verified that the message originated from an external Gmail address. Identified the sender as spam and blocked the email address to prevent further communication. Informed the user to mark the message as phishing and delete it from their inbox.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: RE:
TimeEntry.Notes:
Received a handover from Rishad regarding a user speaker issue. I connected to the user’s computer and began troubleshooting by adjusting the speaker settings. I also instructed the user to remove the headphone wire and reconnect it. However, the user was busy with work and updated me later that they had not yet tried the steps.

After the user confirmed they had restarted the computer, they later updated me that the issue was resolved and the speaker was now working properly. After confirming with the user that everything was functioning as expected, I closed the ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: RE:
TimeEntry.Notes: connected the bluetooth speaker to the users computer,

TimeEntry.Title: RE: 2FA for Godaddy
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the office 365 portal and make sure the licenses are cancelled. Called GoDaddy and work with them to cancel the subscription for Microsoft. Once they have cancelled then push them to initiate the refund for wrong charges.

TimeEntry.Title: My remote latest version updated on ALG-HQ-LPT-03, ALG-HQ-LPT-13, ALG-HQ-LPT-16, HAILEY with 25.9.9.9533
TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the following machines: ALG-HQ-LPT-03, ALG-HQ-LPT-13, ALG-HQ-LPT-16, and HAILEY. Verified the My Remote application version on each system and updated it to the latest version 25.9.9.9533 successfully.

Confirmed that the application is running properly after the update. No further issues observed at this time.

TimeEntry.Title: Setup Huntress SAT for phishing and training.
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Huntress SAT portal and then create and setup new client ALG on portal. After that setup the authentication with Azure portal to setup syncing for all users for learners.

TimeEntry.Title: My Remote version 25.9.9.9533 updated on machine ALG-HQ-LPT-10 and ALG-HQ-LPT-06
TimeEntry.Notes: Review the my remote portal, and found the machine ALG-HQ-LPT-10 and ALG-HQ-LPT-06 running with old version of My Remote. Tried to reinstall the agent from my remote portal, but not succeeded. Tried to restart the service and reinstall again, but unable to update it. So connected to the machine from manage engine .Uninstalled the old version and reinstalled the latest version 25.9.9.9533. After that refresh the machine from the portal. It was updated to latest

TimeEntry.Title: EasyDMRC configurations for ALG
TimeEntry.Notes: As they have migrated to the O365 so setup them on the easydmarc and added the required records at DNS provider and waiting for the configured it properly.

TimeEntry.Title: Accessed the Cisco Umbrella portal to verify that all computers are properly syncing with the portal and appearing as expected.
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed the Cisco Umbrella portal to verify that all computers are properly syncing with the portal and appearing as expected.

TimeEntry.Title: Email Permission
TimeEntry.Notes:
User reported an issue that she is not getting emails from Salesforce....

so login to the office 365 portal and trace the user mailbox and found that mails from the Sales force was Quarantine...

so went to release the mails from Quarantine...

user confirmed she has got the mails.....hence closing the ticket....

TimeEntry.Title: Urgent! Need to update passwords
TimeEntry.Notes:
Deepak mailed in that Thomas having password issue....

so  connect to the user computer and he want to access the Teams..However checked that user has Exchange Plan 1 license...

So upgrade the License to Microsoft Standard after the approval of Deepak...

After License connect to the user system again...

Make him login to the Teams...howerver user has multiple teams account and he want to user all without switching the account..

So did that....no more issue reported by the user....hence closing the ticket....

TimeEntry.Title: Installed failed patched on the computer ALG-HQ-LPT-10
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the approved patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the missing/failed updates for the system ALG-HQ-LPT-10.

Downloaded and manually installed the applicable driver and BIOS updates, including:

  • RTL8852CE PCIe 802.11ax Wireless Network Controller [PCI\VEN_10EC&DEV_C852] (6001.16.173.0)

  • Realtek High Definition Audio [INTELAUDIO\FUNC_01&VEN_10EC&DEV_0295] (6.0.9932.1)

  • Raptor Lake-U (Intel Graphics) [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_A7AC] (32.0.101.7080)

  • Inspiron 16 5640 BIOS (1.19.0)

Completed the installation and verified the updated driver and BIOS versions through Device Manager and system information.

Performed a post-installation scan to confirm compliance. All previously missing/failed updates are now successfully installed and reflecting compliant status in the ManageEngine console.

System reboot will be performed after business hours

TimeEntry.Title: Veeam O365 configurations for ALG
TimeEntry.Notes: Performed a complete end-to-end setup of the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 environment for the ALG client, beginning with logging into the QNAP NAS and configuring a dedicated iSCSI target and LUN on the isolated backup network to ensure optimized throughput and secure storage segmentation. After creating the iSCSI storage, logged into the Veeam 365 backup server and used the Windows iSCSI Initiator to connect to the newly created QNAP target, ensuring persistent binding for automatic reconnection. Once connected, initialized the disk in Disk Management, formatted it with NTFS, assigned an appropriate volume label, and verified that the storage was fully accessible for use as a Veeam repository. Proceeded to the Microsoft Azure portal under the ALG tenant and created the required Azure Application Registration for Veeam, configuring all necessary modern app-only authentication settings, generating and securely recording the client secret, and assigning the correct API permissions and Azure roles needed for Veeam to access Microsoft 365 resources. After confirming the application setup, returned to the Veeam Backup for Microsoft 365 console and added the ALG Microsoft 365 organization using the newly created Azure app credentials, validating successful communication with Exchange Online, SharePoint Online, OneDrive for Business, and Microsoft Teams workloads. Then created a new backup repository within the Veeam V365 environment and mapped it to the previously attached iSCSI volume, confirming retention settings and repository health. With storage and authentication correctly configured, created the ALG backup job, selected all required services, applied the proper job settings, and initiated the first backup run. Verified that the job started successfully, monitored initial throughput and logging, and confirmed that the backup job is currently running and progressing as expected without errors.

TimeEntry.Title: Inky configurations for ALG
TimeEntry.Notes: As they have migrated to the O365 so setup them on the Inky and added the required details at inky portal and then started the installation and installation is completed and client is setup on the portal but it will take upto 24 hours to propagate like other clients.

TimeEntry.Title: EasyDMRC configurations for ALG
TimeEntry.Notes: Verified the status of the clients settings and made some changes and all the policies are applied successfully and confirmed with vendor as well on other changes are required. Hence closing this ticket.

so login to the 0ffice 365 portal and trace the emails and didn't found any email in trace...

user reported she has received the email...

Also add the email in Tenant allowed list....hence closing the ticket...

TimeEntry.Title: Foxit installation
TimeEntry.Notes:
Install foxit reader. 

Computer was slow, scanning the computer. dsable auto start on few applications. 

Install Foxit editor

TimeEntry.Title: Foxit installation
TimeEntry.Notes:
Computer was slow, scanning the computer. disable auto start on few applications. 

Reached Foxit team and received the editor file

 Unzip the 7zip file. Install Foxit editor,

TimeEntry.Notes: Verified the status and confirmed the inky is configured for ALG as excepted same as other clients. Hence closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Potential scam
TimeEntry.Notes: offlxcew0rkin@gmail.com, blocked this spam sender, as per Andrew's request.

TimeEntry.Title: RE: 2FA for Godaddy
TimeEntry.Notes: Called with GoDaddy and confirm that the subscription has been cancelled now. and the refund has been initiated from their end.

TimeEntry.Title: Setup SAT Huntress portal for ALG.
TimeEntry.Notes: Worked on the portal as per the Huntress team's instructions and then setup the learners and provider accordingly.

TimeEntry.Title: Synchronization Issue ALG-HQ-LPT-12, ALG-HQ-LPT-08, ALG-HQ-LPT-14 ALG-HQ-LPT-06(ManageEngine)
TimeEntry.Notes: Checked the ManageEngine portal and found synchronization issues with  Logged in   ALG-HQ-LPT-12, ALG-HQ-LPT-08, ALG-HQ-LPT-14 ALG-HQ-LPT-06 and resolved the issue. All machines are now syncing properly with ManageEngine.

TimeEntry.Title: Fang-Computer or Onedrive Issue
TimeEntry.Notes:
• Received a call from Fang regarding two issues: her OneDrive login and computer password.

  • Instructed Fang to log in to her computer first and wait for confirmation before further action.

  • After receiving confirmation that she was logged in, connected remotely to her computer and reviewed the OneDrive login issue.

  • Assisted Fang with OneDrive login on her computer by troubleshooting any login-related issues, ensuring she could access her files.

  • Explained how to log in to OneDrive via the web. Walked her through the process, showing how she could:

    • Modify files (editing documents directly).

    • Rename files (changing file names on the cloud).

    • Delete files (removing unwanted files from OneDrive).

  • Installed any necessary software that was required for OneDrive functionality or related tools.

  • Tested the system to ensure everything was functioning as expected with OneDrive and confirmed that all issues were resolved.

  • Confirmed with Fang that she could now access and manage her OneDrive files both on her computer and via the web.

  • Closed the ticket after confirming that everything was working fine and Fang was satisfied with the resolution.

TimeEntry.Title: Veeam O365 configurations for ALG
TimeEntry.Notes: As verified the status of the backup job the first time full backup is still in progress.

TimeEntry.Title: Najmeh email archive full
TimeEntry.Notes: Najmeh archive mail was reaching 50gb, checked the 365 and informed Deepak and requested for permission to grant E3 license for the user.
